agentRoleDescriptionPlaceholder: Please enter the role description of the main Agent, e.g.: Created by xxx company, it is a complex general artificial intelligence.
agentRoleNamePlaceholder: Please enter the role name of the main Agent, e.g.: Super Magic
customServiceProviderWhitelistPlaceholde: Please enter organization codes, separated by commas
customServiceProviderWhitelistTip: Enter the organization codes allowed to access custom service providers. Separate multiple organization codes with commas.
filingLinkInvalid: Filing link must start with http:// or https://
filingNumberPlaceholder: Please enter filing number, e.g.: ICP License No. 2026000001
filingNumberRequired: Filing number is required when showing filing
platformDefaultLanguageTip: The language set is the default language when the platform is initialized. All functions that support multiple languages will use this default language
uploadPngTip: It is recommended to upload PNG logos, and the size should not exceed 2 M
uploadSvgTip: It is recommended to upload SVG logos, and the size should not exceed 2 M
